meta.title: Kim Andrè Furevikstrand — Senior Software Engineer
meta.description: Senior TypeScript / Node.js / React engineer with 10+ years and 30+ shipped projects. Available for remote and Norway-based roles.

chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Kim's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience, projects, or availability.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.help:
**Available commands:**

*Topics*
`/about` — Who is Kim
`/experience` — Work history
`/stack` — Tech stack
`/skills` — Competency breakdown
`/projects` — Open-source projects
`/hire` — Availability
`/contact` — How to reach me
`/cv` — Download CV
`/location` — Where I'm based
`/databases` — Database experience
`/devops` — Docker & deployment
`/mentoring` — Leadership & mentoring
`/style` — How I work
`/certifications` — Certificates & courses
`/education` — Academic background
`/testimonials` — What colleagues say

*Language*
`/en` `/no` `/pt` — Switch language

*Other*
`/help` — Show this message
`/clear` — Clear the screen

Or just ask naturally in any language.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
